name: Golf Habitat
address: 101 Butterfield Rd Suite D, Yakima, WA 98901
about: Golf Habitat is an indoor golf simulator venue featuring GOLFZON TwoVisionNX technology. The facility offers three separate simulator bays, with each bay accommodating up to six golfers and equipped with a multi-surface hitting mat, moving swing plate, and automatic ball retrieval and tee-up system. Golfers can choose from over 280 virtual courses worldwide, including Pebble Beach and St. Andrews, or practice using the driving range, chipping course, or putting modes. The venue provides a comfortable environment with refreshments and seating, allowing for a controlled and repeatable golf experience away from the course.
why_golfers_like_it: Immersive GOLFZON TwoVisionNX simulator technology with swing analytics and video replay
Access to over 280 worldwide courses, including renowned locations like Pebble Beach
Controlled and repeatable golf experience without the time constraints of traditional courses
Comfortable environment with refreshments and private event options

food_and_drink.notes: Outside food is allowed for private events; beverages must be purchased in-house
Beverages must be purchased in-house; no BYOB policy mentioned

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced simulator with automatic ball retrieval, moving swing plate, and multi-surface hitting mat

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: Outside food is allowed for private events, but all beverages must be purchased in-house.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify the time required for an 18-hole round, but individual simulator bookings are available by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Habitat offers junior courses for kids and allows private events, making it suitable for families.
